Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Trust Property; To Quiet Title; For Adverse Possession; And, For Breach Of Spousal Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Continued To May-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Lamping for Shlomo Franco.
Dahlia Franco (Wife of Walter Franco) also present.

Ms. Franco requested a continuance stating that her Husband is in the hospital, spoke of his medical condition, spoke of the agreement between her Husband and his Ex-Wife, explained why her Husband waited and did not get documents signed by the Ex-Wife, and stated that they can not afford an Attorney. Mr. Lamping stated that he is not being unsympathetic in anyway, that before they get to an evidentiary hearing they need Mr. Franco's written objections, that Mr. Franco may need to execute a power of attorney or have a Conservator appointed, that a six month continuance is excessive and suggested setting a 30-day status hearing. Mr. Lamping also stated that Mr. Franco needs someone to act on his behalf, that Mr. Franco has not responded to any communication, that he sent Mr. Franco four letters and that he is amenable to mediation, but he can not do that without someone acting and not knowing what the objections are. In addition, Mr. Lamping suggested that the Court order written responses within 30-days. The Petition to Confirm Ownership of Trust Property, etc. is continued to May 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on appointment of Counsel, appointment of a Conservator and written objections.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
